query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%content%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%page%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%policy%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%terms%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%content%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%page%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%policy%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%terms%';
